programs.title: The Sweeney
programs.desc: When a convicted criminal grasses up a group of CID officers involved in bribery, Regan and Carter go undercover to investigate the corruption charges against them.

programs.title: BattleBots
programs.desc: US robot combat series. The first Sin City Slugfest continues as the remaining bots go head-to-head for a chance to reach the Golden Bolt tournament.

programs.title: Magnum, P.I.
programs.desc: Classic US action drama series. In a weird reversal of their usual roles, Higgins becomes irresponsible while Thomas adopts a more mature image with a blazer.

programs.title: Kojak
programs.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo agonises over accepting an offer from a leading law firm when a series of drug-related deaths overshadows his decision-making.

programs.title: The Saint
programs.desc: Suave troubleshooter Simon Templar investigates another case. The Saint rescues a Russian damsel in distress and agrees to help her fend off some art thieves.

programs.title: Boon
programs.desc: Classic drama. Child-minding is not Ken's idea of a glamorous job, and especially so when the child is the difficult son of a fading rock star.
